## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the use case or pain point.

## Proposed solution

How should lazyline address this? Include CLI interface ideas, expected output,
or behavior changes if applicable.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about, and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Links, examples, or references that help illustrate the request.
